title: Beige Fashion Poster Collage
sourceTitle: Chatgpt Prompt Vertical Poster Collage Design Beige

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical poster collage design, beige background, four stacked horizontal rounded rectangles containing black and white cinematic portraits of the same young woman wearing sunglasses in different stylish poses. Foreground features a full-color high-quality cutout of the woman on the left side, wearing a pink mauve fitted shirt, black pants, sunglasses, confident cool pose, modern fashion editorial style, soft studio lighting, ultra realistic, premium magazine aesthetic, depth and shadow effects, clean minimal layout, 2:3 aspect ratio.
imagePrompts.title: Chatgpt Prompt Vertical Poster Collage Design Beige

prompt: Vertical poster collage design, beige background, four stacked horizontal rounded rectangles containing black and white cinematic portraits of the same young woman wearing sunglasses in different stylish poses. Foreground features a full-color high-quality cutout of the woman on the left side, wearing a pink mauve fitted shirt, black pants, sunglasses, confident cool pose, modern fashion editorial style, soft studio lighting, ultra realistic, premium magazine aesthetic, depth and shadow effects, clean minimal layout, 2:3 aspect ratio.
originalPrompt: Vertical poster collage design, beige background, four stacked horizontal rounded rectangles containing black and white cinematic portraits of the same young woman wearing sunglasses in different stylish poses. Foreground features a full-color high-quality cutout of the woman on the left side, wearing a pink mauve fitted shirt, black pants, sunglasses, confident cool pose, modern fashion editorial style, soft studio lighting, ultra realistic, premium magazine aesthetic, depth and shadow effects, clean minimal layout, 2:3 aspect ratio.

promptTranslations.zh: 垂直海报拼贴设计，米色背景，四个横向堆叠的圆角矩形，内部是同一位年轻女性戴着太阳镜、摆出不同 stylish 姿势的黑白电影感人像。前景左侧放置该女性的全彩高质量抠图，她穿粉紫色修身衬衫、黑色长裤和太阳镜，姿态自信冷感；现代时尚编辑风，柔和影棚灯光，超写实，高级杂志美学，带深度与阴影效果，干净极简版式，2:3 aspect ratio。
promptTranslations.fr: Design de collage vertical pour affiche, fond beige, avec quatre rectangles horizontaux arrondis empilés contenant des portraits cinématographiques en noir et blanc de la même jeune femme portant des lunettes de soleil dans différentes poses stylées. Au premier plan, à gauche, un détourage couleur haute qualité de la femme : chemise ajustée rose mauve, pantalon noir, lunettes de soleil, pose cool et sûre d’elle, style éditorial mode moderne, lumière de studio douce, ultra réaliste, esthétique magazine premium, effets de profondeur et d’ombre, mise en page minimaliste propre, aspect ratio 2:3.
promptTranslations.ru: Вертикальный постер-коллаж на бежевом фоне: четыре сложенных друг над другом горизонтальных прямоугольника со скругленными углами содержат черно-белые кинематографичные портреты одной и той же молодой женщины в солнцезащитных очках и разных стильных позах. На переднем плане слева — качественный полноцветный вырез этой женщины: приталенная розово-лиловая рубашка, черные брюки, солнцезащитные очки, уверенная прохладная поза, современный fashion editorial, мягкий студийный свет, ультрареализм, премиальная журнальная эстетика, эффекты глубины и тени, чистая минималистичная композиция, aspect ratio 2:3.
promptTranslations.pt: Design de pôster vertical em colagem, fundo bege, quatro retângulos horizontais arredondados empilhados contendo retratos cinematográficos em preto e branco da mesma jovem usando óculos de sol em diferentes poses estilosas. No primeiro plano, à esquerda, um recorte colorido de alta qualidade da mulher, vestindo camisa ajustada rosa malva, calça preta e óculos de sol, pose confiante e cool, estilo editorial de moda moderno, iluminação suave de estúdio, ultra-realista, estética de revista premium, efeitos de profundidade e sombra, layout limpo e minimalista, aspect ratio 2:3.
promptTranslations.ja: ベージュ背景の縦型ポスターコラージュ。横長の角丸長方形を4段に重ね、それぞれにサングラスをかけた同じ若い女性の、異なるスタイリッシュなポーズの白黒シネマティックポートレートを入れる。前景左側には女性の高品質なフルカラー切り抜きを配置。ピンクモーブのフィットシャツ、黒いパンツ、サングラス、自信のあるクールなポーズ。モダンなファッションエディトリアル、柔らかなスタジオ照明、超リアル、プレミアム雑誌風の美学、奥行きと影の効果、クリーンなミニマルレイアウト、aspect ratio 2:3。
promptTranslations.ko: 베이지 배경의 세로 포스터 콜라주 디자인. 가로로 긴 둥근 직사각형 4개를 위아래로 쌓고, 각 프레임 안에는 선글라스를 쓴 동일한 젊은 여성이 서로 다른 스타일리시한 포즈를 취한 흑백 시네마틱 포트레이트를 배치합니다. 전경 왼쪽에는 여성의 고품질 풀컬러 컷아웃을 배치하고, 분홍빛 모브 컬러의 핏 셔츠, 검은색 팬츠, 선글라스, 자신감 있고 쿨한 포즈를 사용합니다. 모던 패션 에디토리얼 스타일, 부드러운 스튜디오 조명, 울트라 리얼, 프리미엄 매거진 미학, 깊이와 그림자 효과, 깔끔한 미니멀 레이아웃, aspect ratio 2:3.
